title: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error
impact: Users may have been unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and received an error.

updates.content:
Title: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error

User impact: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error.

 
More info: Users receive an error stating “Something went wrong” when attempting to load the Data Quality page. 
 
Current status: We've identified that a recent code change switched the underlying data source for certain pages in Microsoft Viva Insights, introducing a temporary service API issue that resulted in impact. We're validating a code fix to potentially remediate impact. Once this validation completes we'll deploy the code fix to the affected environment.
 
Scope of impact: Any user attempting to load the Data Quality page may be impacted. 
 
Next update by: Friday, April 3, 2026, at 8:30 PM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error

User impact: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error.

More info: Users receive an error stating “Something went wrong” when attempting to load the Data Quality page. 

Current status: We're continuing to validate the code fix that we expect will remediate impact. Once this validation completes we'll deploy the code fix to the affected environment and provide a timeline for remediation.

Scope of impact: Any user attempting to load the Data Quality page may be impacted. 
 
Start time: Thursday, April 2, 2026, at 2:37 AM UTC
 
Root cause: A recent code change switched the underlying data source for certain pages in Microsoft Viva Insights, introducing a temporary service API issue that resulted in impact.

Next update by: Friday, April 3, 2026, at 10:30 PM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error

User impact: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error.

More info: Users receive an error stating “Something went wrong” when attempting to load the Data Quality page. 
 
Current status: We've validated the code fix and started deploying it to all impacted users. We expect this will complete and remediate impact by our next scheduled update.
 
Scope of impact: Any user attempting to load the Data Quality page may be impacted. 

Start time: Thursday, April 2, 2026, at 2:37 AM UTC

Root cause: A recent code change switched the underlying data source for certain pages in Microsoft Viva Insights, introducing a temporary service API issue that resulted in impact.
 
Next update by: Saturday, April 4, 2026, at 1:00 AM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error

User impact: Users may have been unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and received an error.

More info: Users received an error stating “Something went wrong” when attempting to load the Data Quality page.

Final status: The deployment of the code fix completed, and after a period of monitoring, we've confirmed impact is remediated.

Scope of impact: Any user attempting to load the Data Quality page may have been impacted.

Start time: Thursday, April 2, 2026, at 2:37 AM UTC

End time: Friday, April 3, 2026, at 10:40 PM UTC

Root cause: A recent code change switched the underlying data source for the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights, introducing a temporary service API issue that resulted in impact.

Next steps: 
 - To help prevent similar impact in the future, we're further reviewing our code change release procedures to identify issues before being deployed.

This is the final update for the event.
